tasks.title: Build bootstrap skeleton
tasks.summary: Create the canonical Windows bootstrap files and build entrypoints.
notes: 2026-07-04 하이브리드 빌드 계약 (11 §1.1): cmux_app 셸만 vcxproj(WinAppSDK MSBuild targets — XamlCompiler/winmd/PRI)로 빌드하고 CMake custom target이 msbuild를 호출한다. 나머지 target(core/terminal/ipc/cli/tests)은 순수 CMake. 진입점은 cmake preset 하나로 불변.
이 task는 빌드 스파이크로 취급한다: CMake↔vcxproj 접합(정적 라이브러리 소비, NuGet restore 순서)이 여기서 처음 검증되므로 실패 시 조기 보고한다.

tasks.title: Dependency pinning and overlay ports
tasks.summary: Create vcpkg and NuGet pinning files, including the libvterm overlay location.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify libvterm overlay path is fixed at ports/libvterm and vcpkg-configuration.json overlay-ports references ./ports
manual: verify NuGet and vcpkg dependency ownership is not duplicated per _workspace/11-build-release.md §3 table
manual: verify vcpkg.json lists at minimum: libvterm (overlay), nlohmann-json, gtest

tasks.title: Runtime manifest and resources
tasks.summary: Create the manifest and resource skeleton used by the unpackaged desktop app.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify app.manifest sets dpiAwareness to PerMonitorV2
manual: verify app.manifest sets the Win10/Win11 lineage supportedOS compatibility GUID (Win11 shares the Win10 GUID; support floor is Win11 22H2+ per 00 §4)
manual: verify .rc file compiles without error in dev-x64 preset build
notes: unpackaged app이므로 appxmanifest 아님. Win32 side-by-side manifest(.manifest)를 링커에 /MANIFEST:EMBED 로 임베딩

tasks.title: ADR freeze
tasks.summary: Write the required ADRs for threading, passthrough fallback, parser choice, and panel lifecycle.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify adr-0001 through adr-0004 exist and are cross-referenced from the domain docs
notes: 2025-01: All 4 ADRs exist and are Status: accepted at _workspace/adr/. Task outputs verified present.
Cross-reference cleanup (linking ADRs from domain docs) may still be needed as minor follow-up.

tasks.title: Shared utilities
tasks.summary: Add logging, string/encoding, and dispatcher helper scaffolding.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify dispatcher_queue_helper.h wraps DispatcherQueue.TryEnqueue and logs on enqueue failure (see _workspace/adr/adr-0001-terminal-threading.md §DispatcherQueue 규칙)
manual: verify logger does not block the UI thread — async sink or background queue 필수
manual: verify string_encoding.h provides UTF-8 <-> UTF-16 conversion helpers
notes: logger: spdlog (vcpkg) 또는 WinRT ETW sink 중 선택. v1은 spdlog 권장 (vcpkg 패키지 존재)
dispatcher_queue_helper: TryEnqueue 실패 시 spdlog::error() 호출 필수

tasks.title: Settings and shortcut schema
tasks.summary: Lock settings schema, shortcut scopes, precedence, migration, and atomic write rules.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify field names, types, and defaults are fixed in the doc
notes: 2025-01: _workspace/09-config-settings.md already contains complete v1 settings schema, precedence rules, atomic write, and migration. Field names, types, and defaults are documented. Acceptance verified.

tasks.title: Release prework
tasks.summary: Separate release-only backlog items from implementation-start scope.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify _workspace/11-build-release.md §9 lists Azure Trusted Signing, winget, scoop, updater, symbol upload as M7-only items outside v1 gate
manual: verify _workspace/12-tasks.md has a release-only section clearly separated from milestone implementation tasks
notes: 2025-01: _workspace/11-build-release.md §9 and _workspace/12-tasks.md already have release-only items (Azure Trusted Signing, winget, scoop, updater, symbol upload) separated from milestone implementation tasks. Acceptance verified.

tasks.title: Parity partial re-audit freeze
tasks.summary: Re-audit the 9 partial rows in 18 §6.3: correct stale rows to covered and disposition every remaining sub-item as contract+task registration or explicit §4 exclusion, per 18 §7.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify stale rows (terminal search state → m2-6, clipboard sub-item → m6-7) are flipped to covered with justification and §2 통계가 재집계됨
manual: verify every 18 §6.3 sub-item has an explicit disposition (task 등록 또는 §4 제외) recorded in 18 §7.2
manual: verify newly registered tasks (if any) pass cmux-plan validate and follow doc-freeze/tc conventions
notes: doc/policy-freeze task; auto acceptance is the doc-linter anchor check, completeness is manual

이분법 기준 (2026-07-04 grill-me 확정): UX 가시 sub-item(focus flash, WebView2 shortcut preservation, window title parity, browser-open 라우팅, scroll/focus polish, titlebar button hide/offset 등)은 계약+task 등록, 진단성 sub-item(lag logging, update/focus debug hook 등)은 §4 명시 제외를 기본값으로 한다.

tasks.title: Milestone AT gate (acceptance_manual drain)
tasks.summary: Human/AT checkpoint: execute every queued acceptance_manual item in this milestone and record results before the milestone rolls up to done.
acceptance_manual: manual: verify every acceptance_manual item of this milestone's tasks was executed and its result (pass/fail/skip + 사유) recorded in this task's notes
notes: commands: [] — human/AT gate task; done 전환은 사람 검증으로만 수행한다 (plans/README.md 'AT gate 규칙'). 자율 루프는 이 task를 집지 않는다.
